## Purpose of the agent or instruction
 
Describe the main goal of the agent, automation, or instruction.
 
## Usage context
 
Explain when, where, or why this instruction will be used.
 
## File content
 
Describe the expected content for the `AGENT.md` or `*.instructions.md` file.
 
## Usage example
 
Add an example showing how this instruction would be used, if applicable.
